Nick and Norah's Infinite Playlist (2008)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $31,487,293Details
International Box Office $2,398,724
Worldwide Box Office $33,886,017
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $11,445,039
Total $11,445,039
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$11,311,751 (35.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.78 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:92.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$10,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,421 opening theaters/2,421 max. theaters, 4.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $52,449,587

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 3rd, 2008 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
Video Release: February 3rd, 2009 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for mature thematic material including teen drinking, sexuality, language and crude behavior.
Running Time: 86 minutes
Plot point: Musicians, Relationship Advice, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance
Subgenre: Romantic Drama
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Screen Gems, Columbia Pictures, Mandate Pictures, Depth of Field
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
